name: Activepieces
description: Your friendliest open source AI automation tool
compose:
name: slashnode-activepieces
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/activepieces/activepieces:0.85.4
    container_name: activepieces-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      AP_ENGINE_EXECUTABLE_PATH: dist/packages/engine/main.js
      AP_API_KEY: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      AP_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${secret.APP_AP_ENCRYPTION_KEY}
      AP_JWT_SECRET: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      AP_ENVIRONMENT: prod
      AP_FRONTEND_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8146
      AP_WEBHOOK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS: '30'
      AP_TRIGGER_DEFAULT_POLL_INTERVAL: '5'
      AP_POSTGRES_DATABASE: activepieces
      AP_POSTGRES_HOST: activepieces-db
      AP_POSTGRES_PORT: '5432'
      AP_POSTGRES_USERNAME: activepieces
      AP_POSTGRES_PASSWORD: activepieces
      AP_EXECUTION_MODE: UNSANDBOXED
      AP_REDIS_HOST: activepieces-redis
      AP_REDIS_PORT: '6379'
      AP_FLOW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS: '600'
      AP_TELEMETRY_ENABLED: 'true'
      AP_TEMPLATES_SOURCE_URL: https://cloud.activepieces.com/api/v1/flow-templates
    volumes:
      - app_data-app-cache:/usr/src/app/cache
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8146:80
  db:
    image: postgres:17.4
    container_name: activepieces-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: activepieces
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: activepieces
      POSTGRES_USER: activepieces
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  redis:
    image: redis:7.4.3
    container_name: activepieces-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app-cache:
    name: slashnode-activepieces_app_data-app-cache
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-activepieces_db_data-db
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-activepieces_redis_data-redis
